overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in heavy winter gear exploring a desolate, snow-covered rocky landscape at night. The character walks steadily through the terrain, navigating between large boulders and across open snow fields under a dark, cloudy sky with atmospheric blue lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow corridor between large boulders

events.description: character begins ascending a rocky incline and adjusts direction to navigate the terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow passage between large snow-covered boulders, heading toward a rocky ridge

entered.detail: massive gray boulder formation directly ahead, serving as the initial focal point
cluster of medium-sized rocks partially buried in snow
group of snow-dusted boulders lining the path
white snow surface with footprints and slight undulations
night sky filled with dark clouds and subtle atmospheric lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a confined rocky corridor in a snowy wasteland at night. Large boulders flank both sides while a massive rock formation looms ahead. The ground is completely covered in snow, and the dark cloudy sky provides dim ambient illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: traversing across open snow-covered terrain, moving away from the rocky corridor into a more expansive landscape

entered.detail: expansive flat snow-covered area stretching to the horizon
jagged rocky outcrops visible on the distant left horizon
scattered boulders and rock piles on the distant right

segments.scene_description: Having navigated past the initial rocky corridor, the character now walks across a vast open snow field. The terrain is flatter with only occasional scattered rocks. Distant rock formations are visible on the horizon under the same dark night sky, creating a sense of isolation and scale.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic rocky corridor that gradually opens into a vast, desolate snow field. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage flanked by towering boulders under a dim, cloudy night sky. As the character pushes forward past a massive rock formation, the confining walls of the corridor recede and the terrain flattens. The scene then expands into an immense open expanse of snow with only occasional scattered rocks, shifting the mood from enclosure to a sense of overwhelming isolation. Finally, the camera tracks the character across this wide plain toward distant rock formations looming on the horizon.
